name: railyard
description: Guided ops for the Railyard platform — agents, governors, tools, workflows, credentials, knowledge graph, memories, chat, integrations, inbound sources, LLM models, ML stack (model-definitions, trained-models, training-runs, datasets, ONNX), pipelines, skills, chatbots, budgets/costs, alerts/notifications, compliance, dashboards, webhooks. REST API with iterative build-test-fix verification.
